tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan
Basic plan users receive email support during business hours (9 AM – 6 PM EST)
All plans include a 7-day free trial
Users can upgrade or downgrade plans at any time
Data is retained for 30 days after account cancellation

faq.question: What is AutoStream?
faq.answer: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools designed specifically for content creators. It uses AI to streamline the editing process, saving creators hours of manual work.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV formats for both import and export.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. However, refunds are not available after 7 days of purchase.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, all plans include a 7-day free trial so you can explore the features before committing.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports exports optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn.
